title: Customer Segmentation with Multi-Dimensional Data
scenario: Write a prompt to classify a set of customers into predefined segments (young adults, families, retirees), given a dataset with multi-dimensional customer information (age, income, location, interests). The LLM output should be in the format of a CSV table with customer information, segment, and segment score. Target output should include at least 50 customers, with each customer correctly classified and segment score accurately calculated.
constraints: Must handle multi-dimensional customer data and relationships.
Must be robust to varying customer characteristics and behaviors.
Must provide accurate segment categorization and score for each customer.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the LLM output conform to the expected CSV format?
Does the LLM correctly classify customers into predefined segments?
Does the LLM accurately calculate segment scores for each classification?
Does the LLM output cover all customers and segments?
